productName: Lish Organics - Full Melt Bubble Hash - DOH Tested - GMO - 1g
description: Solventless hybrid bubble hash from GMO — ice-water washed and sifted through micron mesh bags to collect pristine, trichome-rich resin heads, no chemicals at all. Pure trichome craft, with notes of blue cheese, cheese, and earthy, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
